title: Mega Man 9 - Plug Electric (Plug Man Stage) on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Merry Christmas everyone!

I bet it's not the first time you've heard that... and it won't be the last.

Anyway this is my entry into Levus's second contest. I chose to do Plug Man's theme, making this my second MM9 song to do. I'm getting the game as soon as I can get my Wii to update... which it doesn't ever complete for some reason, despite the fact that every other online feature works fine. Any tips?

Anyway, this was fun to make. I used Statoshi's Mario Paint Mochi (high quality Mario Paint sounds) for the first time (yes, Levus said that was okay). Consider this my Christmas gift to you all, and be sure to watch it to the end.

Well it's finished uploading and I'm still writing the description, so I'll shut up now so you can concentrate on the video.

Happy Holidays!
